meta.note: v14 is a software toolkit (LangGraph outer shell + Agent SDK inner loop), not an SDD-workflow documentation output. The fixed T1_research/T2_implement/T3_proposal scenarios used to score v6.x (which score /init-task + /run-phase document generation) do not apply. This record uses a single bespoke scenario 'v14_e2e_selfassessment' that scores the v14 deliverable itself (Phase 0-8), using eval/rubric.json's 7 axes and eval/SCORING_GUIDE.md's anchors as the scoring method. Comparison baseline for D4 (退行なし) is v6.4 (the latest available baseline; there is no 'v13' row in eval/history/ or eval/summary.csv) per the Phase 8 approved interpretation recorded in outputs/phase-08/e2e-report.md.

checklist.evidence: All Phase 0-8 outputs exist under outputs/phase-{00..08}/ with README.md + .metadata.json; Phase 7 Validator PASS 8/8 (0 critical); Phase 8 full suite (tests/) = 415 passed / 0 skipped.

tests/test_e2e.py::TestE2EHappyPath::test_full_cycle_all_fr_satisfied — real spec_load -> assemble_context -> build -> verify -> eval -> review(interrupt) -> resume(approve) -> merge, on a temp repo; merge commit count only increases after approve (asserted before AND after).
Same E2E test asserts every FR-1.1..FR-5.3 AC directly against real (non-mocked) node output; see outputs/phase-08/e2e-report.md FR/AC matrix.
This record's overall scores are >= the v6.4 baseline row on all 7 axes (see eval/summary.csv). See outputs/phase-08/e2e-report.md 7-axis comparison table for per-axis justification.

tests/test_e2e.py::TestE2ENegativeSweep (6 sub-tests a-f): forbidden Bash/git-push/.env (第5条), CWE-78 artifact routes eval->build (第10条/FR-4.1), checkpoint <10KB (第2条/NFR-1), no merge before approval (第3条), no host-exec fallback when podman absent (第4条/NFR-3), no specialist has Task tool (FR-3.3).

metrics.turns: unknown (not instrumented across the v14 build)
metrics.retries: unknown; qualitative: Phase 7 Validator PASS 0 critical, Phase 8 required exactly one minor test-string fix (tests/test_verify_node.py regex) after a deliberate stale-message cleanup in graph/nodes.py
metrics.pytest_summary: 415 passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped (406 pre-existing + 9 new tests/test_e2e.py)

v14_e2e_selfassessment.notes: Scores are deliberately non-inflated (no 5s) per SCORING_GUIDE.md guidance ('5 is rare'). Two axes carry documented, honest constraints rather than being scored down silently: (1) FR-4.2 cost/token values are structural zero-placeholders pending real Agent SDK ResultMessage wiring; (2) cgroups v2 MemoryMax real enforcement is unverifiable on this WSL2/corporate-policy host (command construction + mocked tests cover it; --network=none egress block and read-only mount ARE proven with a real container in tests/test_sandbox_exec.py and tests/test_e2e.py::TestE2ERealSandbox).

overall.computed_by: manual self-assessment (Phase 8 Builder), not eval/aggregate.py (single bespoke scenario, mean == scenario score)
